dialogueChunks.intro: There's been a falling out between us and the people at {location}. A trade agreement that held for years was broken, and accusations are flying in both directions.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} was our negotiator, and they say {target_npc} over in {location} deliberately shorted our last shipment. But {target_npc} claims we were the ones who changed the terms. Meanwhile, the {enemy_type} are circling both settlements like vultures.
dialogueChunks.outro: If we don't resolve {quest_focus} quickly, two allies could become enemies while {quest_threat} picks us apart. {player_name}, can you look into this with fresh eyes?

playerResponses.text: I'll hear both sides and sort it out.
Someone has to keep the peace. I'll try.

dialogueChunks.intro: A stretch of land {location_hint} has become a flashpoint. Both our settlement and {location} claim rights to it, and people on both sides are arming up.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} tried to calm things down, but {target_npc} brought armed workers to {quest_focus} yesterday. Our people nearly came to blows. The {enemy_type} have been raiding both sides, which makes everyone angrier and more suspicious.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need an outsider to walk between both camps and find a solution before {quest_threat} turns into something we can't take back. {player_name}, will you help?

playerResponses.text: I'll go speak to both sides.
Violence won't solve anything. I'll mediate.

dialogueChunks.intro: Our water supply was fouled two nights ago. Deliberately. And the only people with access to that cistern besides us are our allies from {location}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} doesn't believe {target_npc}'s people would do this, but the evidence points their way. Someone left {quest_item} residue near the cistern, and that material comes from the mines near {location_hint}. If this was truly sabotage by allies, everything changes.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need the truth, {player_name}. Investigate {quest_focus} and find out who really did this before {quest_threat} destroys an alliance that took years to build.

playerResponses.text: I'll find out who's really behind this.
Could be a setup. I'll investigate.
It was probably just bad luck.
